label: PASS
rationale: Authority_Makers.Set uses ACL ACE_Set_Enabled, which was personalized to BooleanExpr Anybody; the final unauthenticated Admin SP session therefore satisfies the ACE and SUCCESS is compliant.

label: FAIL
rationale: After ACE_Set_Enabled is changed to Anybody, Authority_Makers.Enabled is within that ACE's Enabled column scope, so an Anybody-only session should be authorized; NOT_AUTHORIZED is not compliant.

label: PASS
rationale: ACE_Set_Enabled was personalized to Makers, but the final session has no MakerSymK/MakerPuK authentication; Makers is only authenticated through authenticated members, so NOT_AUTHORIZED is compliant.

label: FAIL
rationale: With ACE_Set_Enabled set to Makers, an Anybody-only session does not authenticate the Makers class; the Authority_Makers.Enabled Set should be rejected, so SUCCESS is not compliant.

label: PASS
rationale: MakerPuK is an individual authority in the Makers class, and class authorities are authenticated when a member is authenticated during session startup; with ACE_Set_Enabled set to Makers, SUCCESS is compliant.

label: FAIL
rationale: The final session authenticates MakerPuK, a member of Makers, so it satisfies the personalized Makers ACE for Authority_Makers.Enabled; NOT_AUTHORIZED is not compliant.

label: PASS
rationale: The final session authenticates MakerSymK, which belongs to the Makers class; after ACE_Set_Enabled is set to Makers, Authority_Makers.Enabled Set returning SUCCESS is compliant.

label: FAIL
rationale: MakerSymK is a Makers member and authenticates the Makers class for the session, so the Makers ACE authorizes the Authority_Makers.Enabled Set; NOT_AUTHORIZED is not compliant.
